query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN id >= 120000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as importadosDataJud, SUM(CASE WHEN id < 120000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cadastradosManual FROM processos WHERE (pdfUrl IS NULL OR pdfUrl = '');
